reviews.review_description: Classic puzzle game originally by Atari. Translates really well to VR. But the devs should optimize performance (sound stutters slightly).

This is a remake at heart of an old game called Klax. I also own this on the Rift, and you know what.. this ones better in some ways to me. The performance is spot on, and I love using the Gotroller with game a lot! If you are a fan of match 3+ games I highly recommend on the Oculus Go.
